violations.text: An open employee's bowl of food was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink or eat from open containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Accumulation of pooling water was observed at the bottom shelf of prep unit lowboy (ambient of unit was 41 degrees Fahrenheit). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -cutting board on deli prep unit -AC units in kitchen (per interview of PIC) Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024

Dishwasher was observed putting away clean dishes after loading dirty dishes. Hands must be properly cleaned in between tasks that contaminate hands. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Bread was observed unwholesome to sight. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

French toast batter (containing raw eggs) was observed stored above ready-to-eat food such as cheese. Raw animal foods must be stored in a manner to protect ready-to-eat foods. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine, can opener, slicer were observed with an accumulation of food residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Can opener and slicer were cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Various foods in deli prep unit were observed between 43-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods were assessed during time of inspection and placed into other refrigeration and/or over ice during time of inspection. Ambient temperature of prep unit was observed at 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit must be properly adjusted/repaired/replaced and maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: -commercial mixer and paddle attachment -cutting board on deli prep unit -AC units in kitchen (per interview of PIC) Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the condenser/evaporator fans and shelving in the walk-in cooler were observed with an accumulation of white residue. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Facility is lacking a service sink (mop sink). New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

An open employees' beverage container (coffee mug) was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Employee cleaned and sanitized slicer at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023
Refrigerator door gasket on the True (cooks) reach in unit were observed in poor repair. Gasket needs to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the drain at air gap in food prep sink was observed to have an accumulation of unidentifiable black substance and residue coming from drain. Drains need to be cleaned on a frequent basis. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2023
The grout on tile flooring at the cook line station was observed in poor repair. Water was observed pooling. Grout needs to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
